requiredChecks.label: 來源可追蹤
requiredChecks.evidence: source is contact, keepsake_waitlist, resources_wishlist, luna_page, or manual_reply.

requiredChecks.label: 守護者與路線存在
requiredChecks.evidence: guardian_id, guardian_name, and related_route are present.

requiredChecks.label: 需求類型明確
requiredChecks.evidence: intake_type maps to owned asset, Luna scene, or repair/contact request.

requiredChecks.label: 素材偏好明確
requiredChecks.evidence: requested_asset describes the requested PDF, wallpaper, ritual, Luna scene, or repair prompt.

requiredChecks.label: 可回覆信箱已取得
requiredChecks.evidence: reply email exists in the source email or structured request, but raw email is not stored in CSV.

requiredChecks.label: 明確同意可回覆
requiredChecks.evidence: consent_status is explicit_reply_ok before any KPI or fulfillment writeback.

requiredChecks.label: 歸因規則已判定
requiredChecks.evidence: utm_content is matched for KPI writeback, or left as manual lead only.

requiredChecks.label: 安全範圍已確認
requiredChecks.evidence: request is not emergency support, diagnosis, therapy replacement, or sensitive personal-data collection.

requiredChecks.label: 證據註記可追溯
requiredChecks.evidence: notes include a verified proof note or the operator has a traceable external proof note.
